_comment: Drives /sources discovery. Edit this (not the Python) to expand. minKana/minRatio gate what counts as text. typology is matched top-to-bottom, first match wins -> sets the tab's `kind` and its VIEW order (by meaning). ORDER: list specific name substrings (CHAT) above broad extension globs (*.DPS), or e.g. CHAT.DPS would match `ui` first. A match pattern is `*` (any), `*.EXT` (extension), or a plain substring. The catch-all `text` stays last. Each kind also names the `parser` /extract uses on it (nullsplit = null-delimited segments + speaker tags; lines = newline-delimited INI/TXT). LOAD order (performance) is computed separately, smallest file first.
